id: Just the Two of Us Grover Washington Jr
folderName: Just the Two of Us Grover Washington Jr
setting: 雨上がりの帰り道、付き合う前の二人が少しだけ本音を話す
lyrics:
I see the crystal raindrops fall
And the beauty of it all
Is when the sun comes shining through
To make those rainbows in my mind
When I think of you sometime
And I wanna spend some time with you

Just the two of us
We can make it if we try
Just the two of us
(Just the two of us)
Just the two of us
Building castles in the sky
Just the two of us
You and I

We look for love, no time for tears
Wasted water's all that is
And it don't make no flowers grow
Good things might come to those who wait
Not for those who wait too late
We gotta go for all we know

Just the two of us
We can make it if we try
Just the two of us
(Just the two of us)
Just the two of us
Building them castles in the sky
Just the two of us
You and I

lyricsJa.en: I see the crystal raindrops fall
lyricsJa.ja: 透き通った雨粒が落ちていくのが見える

lyricsJa.en: And the beauty of it all
lyricsJa.ja: そのすべての美しさは

lyricsJa.en: Is when the sun comes shining through
lyricsJa.ja: 太陽の光が差し込んでくる瞬間にある

lyricsJa.en: To make those rainbows in my mind
lyricsJa.ja: 僕の心の中に、あの虹を描いてくれる

lyricsJa.en: When I think of you sometime
lyricsJa.ja: ふと君のことを思うとき

lyricsJa.en: And I wanna spend some time with you
lyricsJa.ja: 君と少し時間を過ごしたくなる

lyricsJa.en: Just the two of us
lyricsJa.ja: ただ二人だけで

lyricsJa.en: We can make it if we try
lyricsJa.ja: やってみれば、きっとうまくいく

lyricsJa.en: Just the two of us
lyricsJa.ja: ただ二人だけで

lyricsJa.en: (Just the two of us)
lyricsJa.ja: ただ二人だけで

lyricsJa.en: Just the two of us
lyricsJa.ja: ただ二人だけで

lyricsJa.en: Building castles in the sky
lyricsJa.ja: 空に城を築くように、夢を描きながら

lyricsJa.en: Just the two of us
lyricsJa.ja: ただ二人だけで

lyricsJa.en: You and I
lyricsJa.ja: 君と僕で

lyricsJa.en: We look for love, no time for tears
lyricsJa.ja: 僕たちは愛を探している、涙に使う時間なんてない

lyricsJa.en: Wasted water's all that is
lyricsJa.ja: それはただ無駄に流れた水みたいなもの

lyricsJa.en: And it don't make no flowers grow
lyricsJa.ja: それじゃ花は咲かない

lyricsJa.en: Good things might come to those who wait
lyricsJa.ja: 待つ人にはいいことが来るかもしれない

lyricsJa.en: Not for those who wait too late
lyricsJa.ja: でも、遅すぎるまで待つ人には来ない

lyricsJa.en: We gotta go for all we know
lyricsJa.ja: わかっている限り、僕たちは進むしかない

lyricsJa.en: Just the two of us
lyricsJa.ja: ただ二人だけで

lyricsJa.en: We can make it if we try
lyricsJa.ja: やってみれば、きっとうまくいく

lyricsJa.en: Just the two of us
lyricsJa.ja: ただ二人だけで

lyricsJa.en: (Just the two of us)
lyricsJa.ja: ただ二人だけで

lyricsJa.en: Just the two of us
lyricsJa.ja: ただ二人だけで

lyricsJa.en: Building them castles in the sky
lyricsJa.ja: 空に城を築くように、夢を描きながら

lyricsJa.en: Just the two of us
lyricsJa.ja: ただ二人だけで

lyricsJa.en: You and I
lyricsJa.ja: 君と僕で

conversation.speaker: A

sentences.text: The rain finally stopped.
sentences.displayHtml: The rain finally stopped.

sentences.text: The street looks kind of beautiful now.
sentences.displayHtml: The street looks kind of beautiful now.

conversation.japanese: やっと雨が止んだね。道がなんだかきれいに見える。

conversation.speaker: B

sentences.text: Yeah.
sentences.displayHtml: Yeah.

sentences.text: The lights on the puddles look like little rainbows.
sentences.displayHtml: The lights on the puddles look like little rainbows.

conversation.japanese: うん。水たまりに映る光が、小さな虹みたい。

conversation.speaker: A

sentences.text: Honestly, when I think of you sometimes, I catch myself smiling for no reason.
sentences.displayHtml: Honestly, when I think of you sometimes, I catch myself smiling for no reason.

conversation.japanese: 正直、ときどき君のことを考えると、理由もなく笑ってる自分に気づくんだ。

conversation.speaker: B

sentences.text: I do that too.
sentences.displayHtml: I do that too.

sentences.text: I just didn't know if I should say it.
sentences.displayHtml: I just didn't know if I should say it.

conversation.japanese: 私もそうだよ。ただ、言っていいのかわからなかった。

conversation.speaker: A

sentences.text: I kept trying to look for the perfect moment, but maybe I was just nervous.
sentences.displayHtml: I kept trying to look for the perfect moment, but maybe I was just nervous.

conversation.japanese: 完璧なタイミングを探そうとしてたけど、たぶんただ緊張してただけなんだ。

conversation.speaker: B

sentences.text: Maybe there's no time for pretending we don't know what this is.
sentences.displayHtml: Maybe there's no time for pretending we don't know what this is.

conversation.japanese: もしかしたら、もうこの気持ちに気づかないふりをしてる場合じゃないのかも。

conversation.speaker: A

sentences.text: So, what are we calling this?
sentences.displayHtml: So, what are we calling this?

conversation.japanese: じゃあ、これって何て呼べばいいんだろう？

conversation.speaker: B

sentences.text: Maybe we don't have to name it tonight.
sentences.displayHtml: Maybe we don't have to name it tonight.

sentences.text: Let's just start with dinner, just the two of us.
sentences.displayHtml: Let's just start with dinner, just the two of us.

conversation.japanese: 今夜すぐ名前をつけなくてもいいんじゃない？まずは二人だけで、ご飯から始めよう。

conversation.speaker: A

sentences.text: I like that.
sentences.displayHtml: I like that.

sentences.text: No pressure, no big speech.
sentences.displayHtml: No pressure, no big speech.

conversation.japanese: それいいね。重く考えずに、大げさな言葉もなしで。

conversation.speaker: B

sentences.text: Exactly.
sentences.displayHtml: Exactly.

sentences.text: Just dinner, and we can be ourselves for once.
sentences.displayHtml: Just dinner, and we can be ourselves for once.

conversation.japanese: そう。ご飯だけでいいし、今度こそ自然体でいよう。

conversation.speaker: A

sentences.text: I'd like that.
sentences.displayHtml: I'd like that.

sentences.text: I've wanted to spend time with you without overthinking everything.
sentences.displayHtml: I've wanted to spend time with you without overthinking everything.

conversation.japanese: それがいい。考えすぎずに、君と一緒に過ごしたいって思ってたんだ。

conversation.speaker: B

sentences.text: Me too.
sentences.displayHtml: Me too.

sentences.text: Then this weekend, just the two of us.
sentences.displayHtml: Then this weekend, just the two of us.

conversation.japanese: 私も。じゃあ今週末、二人だけで。

conversation.speaker: A

sentences.text: You and I.
sentences.displayHtml: You and I.

sentences.text: I like the sound of that.
sentences.displayHtml: I like the sound of that.

conversation.japanese: 君と僕で。なんかいい響きだね。

thumbnailSource: Grover Washington Jr. - Just the Two of Us Official Lyric Video / RHINO
